questions.statement:
<p>Seven friends K, L, M, N, O, P and Q are sitting on a straight bench facing north. M and Q are not sitting at any of the extreme ends. K is sitting exactly at the middle position. Only P is sitting between Q and N. L is sitting third to the right of K. K is sitting to the immediate left of O.</p>

<p>Who is sitting at the extreme left end?</p>

<p>Which two signs should be interchanged to make the given equation correct?</p>

<p>97 &times; 23 - 18 + 9 &divide; 3 = 66</p>

<p>Select the number from among the given options that can replace the question mark (?) in the following series.&nbsp;</p>

<p>432, 216, 72, 36, 12, ?</p>

<p>In the following number-pairs, the second number is obtained by applying certain mathematical operations to the first number. In three of the four pairs, the same pattern is applied and hence they form a group. Select the number-pair that does NOT belong to this group.</p>

<p>(NOTE : Operations should be performed on the whole numbers, without breaking down the numbers into its constituent digits. E.g. 13 - Operations on 13 such as adding /subtracting /multiplying etc. to 13 can be performed. Breaking down 13 into 1 and 3 and then performing mathematical operations on 1 and 3 is not allowed.)</p>

<p>Select the option that represents the letters that, when sequentially placed from left to right in the blanks below, will complete the letter series.</p>

<p>Q _ _ T _ I F T _ _ F T Q _ F T Q I F T</p>

options: Neither conclusion I nor II follows /
Both the conclusions I and II follow /

questions.statement:
<p>A series is given with one term missing. Select the correct alternative from the given ones that will complete the series.</p>

<p>NT, QY, ?, WI, ZN&nbsp;</p>
Direction : Which of these jumbled words is the odd one out?

In a certain code language, &#39;match is over&#39; is written as &#39;en jo hi&#39;, &#39;the cricket match&#39; is&nbsp;written as &#39;lu mo en&#39;, and &#39;over the globe&#39; is written as &#39;hi lu nok&#39;. How will &#39;cricket&#39; be&nbsp;written in that language?

<p>Select the option in which the given figure is embedded (rotation is NOT allowed).</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/22/06/F1_Savita_SSC_24-6-22_D15.png" style="width: 57px; height: 69px;" /></p>

<p>There are six persons &ndash; C, D, E, X, Y, and Z, each of different ages. Only one person is younger&nbsp;than Y. X is older than E but younger than D. E is older than Y. Neither D nor C is the eldest.</p>

<p>How many people are older than Z?</p>

<p>Select the option that is related to the third word in the same way as the second word is related to the first word.</p>

<p>Latin : Language :: Fencing : ?</p>

options: If statement (A) is the cause and statement (B) is its effect. /
If statement (B) is the cause and statement (A) is its effect. /
If If both statements are effects of independent causes. /
If both statements are effects of some common cause. /

questions.statement:
<p>Select the figure that does NOT belong in the following group.</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/19/05/09_Aug%2001_D1.PNG" /></p>
questions.explanation:
<p>All the shapes that are inside the bigger shape have one side more than the outer shape except figure B. Figure B has square as outer shape and triangle as inner shape.</p>
So figure B is not the part of the group.

questions.statement:
<p>Which figure should replace the question mark (?) if the series were to be continued?<br />
<img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/24/01/F1_SSC_Priya_24_01_24__D27.png" style="width: 396px; height: 82px;" /></p>

<p>The sequence of folding a paper and the manner in which the folded paper is cut is shown in the following figures. How would this paper look when unfolded?</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/24/08/F1_SSC_%20Priya_13_8_24_D29.png" style="width: 254px; height: 131px;" /></p>

<p>Select the correct mirror image of the given figure when the mirror is placed to its right side.</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/23/01/F3_SSC_Mahesh_05.01.2023_D89.png" style="width: 118px; height: 135px;" /></p>

<p>Select the option that is related to the third figure in the same way as the second figure is related to the first figure.</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/25/05/IMG%20-%20636%2030-04-25%20%20%20Yuvraj%20kori%2036.png" /></p>

Seven sisters, Anita, Babita, Sunita, Dixita, Rita, Lalita and Geeta are standing in a row facing north. Lalita is standing to the immediate right of Rita who stands fourth to the right of Geeta. Only Sunita stands exactly between Babita and Dixita. Dixita stands at the middle position.Who stands at the rightmost position?

Mukesh stands in the 4th position from the front in a queue and there are 2 persons between Mukesh and Rakesh. Rakesh stands after Mukesh. If the first person is removed from the queue then what is the position of Rakesh from the front of the queue?
